articles.title: Your spring reading list, mapped
articles.description:
Sixteen new books for spring, sorted for your reading pleasure.

summary: Explore 16 new spring books recommended for Boston readers.

Encourages community engagement through local book clubs and events.

articles.title: American Express is opening a lounge with a terrace at Logan Airport
articles.description:
The lounge will open in 2029.

The post American Express is opening a lounge with a terrace at Logan Airport appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: American Express will open a new lounge at Logan Airport in 2029.
The lounge will feature a terrace for travelers to enjoy.
Boston residents can expect enhanced amenities for frequent flyers.

articles.title: ‘Thank you for 8 great years!’: Fenway Johnnie’s has closed
articles.description:
The Brookline Avenue sports bar is located just steps away from Fenway Park.

The post ‘Thank you for 8 great years!’: Fenway Johnnie’s has closed appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fenway Johnnie's, a popular sports bar, has closed after 8 years of operation.
The bar was located on Brookline Avenue, steps away from Fenway Park.
Local residents lose a beloved gathering spot for sports events and community gatherings.

articles.title: Trump fires Pam Bondi as attorney general
articles.description:
Todd Blanche, the deputy attorney general, will be the acting attorney general, the president said Thursday.

The post Trump fires Pam Bondi as attorney general appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump dismissed Pam Bondi as attorney general on April 2, 2026.
Todd Blanche appointed as acting attorney general following Bondi's termination.
Boston residents may see changes in legal policies under new leadership.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum reacts to Duke’s buzzer-beater loss to UConn: ‘I was sick’
articles.description:
"Hate to see us go out like that, but it was still an unbelievable year."

The post Jayson Tatum reacts to Duke’s buzzer-beater loss to UConn: ‘I was sick’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum expressed disappointment over Duke's loss to UConn in the Elite Eight.
Tatum described his feelings, stating, 'I was sick' after the buzzer-beater defeat.
The loss affects local fans' hopes for a Duke championship this season.

articles.title: NBC10 and NBC Sports Boston to broadcast 13 Legacy games this season
articles.description:
“We’re thrilled to partner with NBC10 Boston and NBC Sports Boston, and are confident they will do an outstanding job telling our athletes’ stories while building excitement around Boston Legacy FC."

The post NBC10 and NBC Sports Boston to broadcast 13 Legacy games this season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NBC10 Boston and NBC Sports Boston will broadcast 13 Legacy FC games this season.
The partnership aims to enhance local sports storytelling and community engagement.
Boston residents can expect increased visibility and excitement for local athletes.

articles.title: Boston man charged with sexually assaulting MBTA bus driver
articles.description:
Michael Vandenbroeke has multiple convictions for violent offenses dating back to 2005, prosecutors said.

The post Boston man charged with sexually assaulting MBTA bus driver appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Michael Vandenbroeke charged with sexually assaulting an MBTA bus driver in Boston.
Vandenbroeke has a history of violent offenses dating back to 2005.
The incident raises concerns about safety for public transit workers in Boston.
